title: acmella bellidioides
intro: Acmella bellidioides, also known as Suckers or Toothache Plant, is a flowering plant native to South America, belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects, as well as its ability to numb the pain. The health benefits of Acmella bellidioides include relief from toothache pain, gum inflammation, and other oral health issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain in other parts of the body. Acmella bellidioides can be consumed as an herbal tea, or its leaves can be chewed fresh to release the numbing compound, which is often used in traditional herbal preparations to soothe sore throats and gums.
